### REQUEST ###

```
Authorization: Bearer REDACTED
Connect-Protocol-Version: 1

Content-Encoding: gzip
```

```
{
  "1:LEN": {
    "1:I64": 4845634861506629183
  },
  "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "6:VARINT": 4,
  "7:LEN": [
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Unit tests for TCP reassembly (out-of-order, retrans).\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.parsers.tcp_reassembly import TCPReassembler\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_reassembly_in_order():\r\n    \"\"\"In-order segments produce correct stream.\"\"\"\r\n    r = TCPReassembler(max_bytes_per_direction=1 << 20)\r\n    segments = [\r\n        (1000.0, b\"Hello\", \"c2s\", 1000),\r\n        (1000.01, b\" \", \"c2s\", 1005),\r\n        (1000.02, b\"World\", \"c2s\", 1006),\r\n        (1000.03, b\"OK\", \"s2c\", 2000),\r\n    ]\r\n    c2s, s2c, _, _, truncated = r.reassemble(segments)\r\n    assert c2s == b\"Hello World\"\r\n    assert s2c == b\"OK\"\r\n    assert not truncated\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_reassembly_out_of_order():\r\n    \"\"\"Out-of-order segments are reordered.\"\"\"\r\n    r = TCPReassembler(max_bytes_per_direction=1 << 20)\r\n    segments = [\r\n        (1000.0, b\"BBB\", \"c2s\", 1003),\r\n        (1000.01, b\"AAA\", \"c2s\", 1000),\r\n        (1000.02, b\"CCC\", \"c2s\", 1006),\r\n    ]\r\n    c2s, s2c, _, _, _ = r.reassemble(segments)\r\n    assert c2s == b\"AAABBBCCC\"\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_reassembly_retrans_duplicate():\r\n    \"\"\"Duplicate (retrans) segment does not duplicate data.\"\"\"\r\n    r = TCPReassembler(max_bytes_per_direction=1 << 20)\r\n    segments = [\r\n        (1000.0, b\"AAA\", \"c2s\", 1000),\r\n        (1000.01, b\"AAA\", \"c2s\", 1000),  # retrans\r\n        (1000.02, b\"BBB\", \"c2s\", 1003),\r\n    ]\r\n    c2s, _, _, _, _ = r.reassemble(segments)\r\n    assert c2s == b\"AAABBB\"\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "bc3296f18e8771af78b1720458817b5e1036de296067eef304381b84f34be962",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Unit tests for HTTP/1.1 transaction extraction.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.correlation import compute_txn_id_http1\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.http1 import HTTP1Handler\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_http1_detect():\r\n    h = HTTP1Handler()\r\n    assert h.detect(b\"GET / HTTP/1.1\\r\\nHost: x\\r\\n\\r\\n\", b\"\") is True\r\n    assert h.detect(b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\n\\r\\n\", b\"\") is True\r\n    assert h.detect(b\"\\x00\\x01\\x02\", b\"\") is False\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_http1_parse_single():\r\n    h = HTTP1Handler()\r\n    c2s = b\"GET /foo HTTP/1.1\\r\\nHost: example.com\\r\\n\\r\\n\"\r\n    s2c = b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\nContent-Length: 5\\r\\n\\r\\nhello\"\r\n    txns = h.parse(c2s, s2c, \"flow1\", [(0, 1000.0)], [(0, 1000.02)])\r\n    assert len(txns) == 1\r\n    assert txns[0].method == \"GET\"\r\n    assert txns[0].path == \"/foo\"\r\n    assert txns[0].authority == \"example.com\"\r\n    assert txns[0].status_code == 200\r\n    assert txns[0].flow_id == \"flow1\"\r\n    assert txns[0].txn_id == compute_txn_id_http1(\"flow1\", 0)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_http1_parse_keepalive_two():\r\n    h = HTTP1Handler()\r\n    c2s = (\r\n        b\"GET /first HTTP/1.1\\r\\nHost: example.com\\r\\nConnection: keep-alive\\r\\n\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"GET /second HTTP/1.1\\r\\nHost: example.com\\r\\nConnection: keep-alive\\r\\n\\r\\n\"\r\n    )\r\n    s2c = (\r\n        b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\nContent-Length: 5\\r\\nConnection: keep-alive\\r\\n\\r\\nhello\"\r\n        b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\nContent-Length: 5\\r\\n\\r\\nworld\"\r\n    )\r\n    txns = h.parse(c2s, s2c, \"flow1\", [(0, 1000.0)], [(0, 1000.02)])\r\n    assert len(txns) == 2\r\n    assert txns[0].path == \"/first\"\r\n    assert txns[1].path == \"/second\"\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "6a98b9871a3240c12092c9f179fc7d5c48c64ed97ba753a02aa5555ee0c6742d",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    }
  ]
}
```

### RESPONSE ###
```
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true
Access-Control-Expose-Headers: Grpc-Status\, Grpc-Message\, Grpc-Status-Details-Bin\, Content-Encoding\, Connect-Content-Encoding\, traceparent\, backend-traceparent\, x-amzn-trace-id\, x-request-id
Content-Type: application/proto
Date: Fri\, 06 Mar 2026 01:24:17 GMT
Vary: Origin
```

```
  "1:VARINT": 1
}
```

(out-of-order, retrans).\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.parsers.tcp_reassembly import TCPReassembler\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_reassembly_in_order():\r\n    \"\"\"In-order segments produce correct stream.\"\"\"\r\n    r = TCPReassembler(max_bytes_per_direction=1 << 20)\r\n    segments = [\r\n        (1000.0, b\"Hello\", \"c2s\", 1000),\r\n        (1000.01, b\" \", \"c2s\", 1005),\r\n        (1000.02, b\"World\", \"c2s\", 1006),\r\n        (1000.03, b\"OK\", \"s2c\", 2000),\r\n    ]\r\n    c2s, s2c, _, _, truncated = r.reassemble(segments)\r\n    assert c2s == b\"Hello World\"\r\n    assert s2c == b\"OK\"\r\n    assert not truncated\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_reassembly_out_of_order():\r\n    \"\"\"Out-of-order segments are reordered.\"\"\"\r\n    r = TCPReassembler(max_bytes_per_direction=1 << 20)\r\n    segments = [\r\n        (1000.0, b\"BBB\", \"c2s\", 1003),\r\n        (1000.01, b\"AAA\", \"c2s\", 1000),\r\n        (1000.02, b\"CCC\", \"c2s\", 1006),\r\n    ]\r\n    c2s, s2c, _, _, _ = r.reassemble(segments)\r\n    assert c2s == b\"AAABBBCCC\"\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_reassembly_retrans_duplicate():\r\n    \"\"\"Duplicate (retrans) segment does not duplicate data.\"\"\"\r\n    r = TCPReassembler(max_bytes_per_direction=1 << 20)\r\n    segments = [\r\n        (1000.0, b\"AAA\", \"c2s\", 1000),\r\n        (1000.01, b\"AAA\", \"c2s\", 1000),  # retrans\r\n        (1000.02, b\"BBB\", \"c2s\", 1003),\r\n    ]\r\n    c2s, _, _, _, _ = r.reassemble(segments)\r\n    assert c2s == b\"AAABBB\"\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Unit tests for HTTP/1.1 transaction extraction.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.correlation import compute_txn_id_http1\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.http1 import HTTP1Handler\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_http1_detect():\r\n    h = HTTP1Handler()\r\n    assert h.detect(b\"GET / HTTP/1.1\\r\\nHost: x\\r\\n\\r\\n\", b\"\") is True\r\n    assert h.detect(b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\n\\r\\n\", b\"\") is True\r\n    assert h.detect(b\"\\x00\\x01\\x02\", b\"\") is False\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_http1_parse_single():\r\n    h = HTTP1Handler()\r\n    c2s = b\"GET /foo HTTP/1.1\\r\\nHost: example.com\\r\\n\\r\\n\"\r\n    s2c = b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\nContent-Length: 5\\r\\n\\r\\nhello\"\r\n    txns = h.parse(c2s, s2c, \"flow1\", [(0, 1000.0)], [(0, 1000.02)])\r\n    assert len(txns) == 1\r\n    assert txns[0].method == \"GET\"\r\n    assert txns[0].path == \"/foo\"\r\n    assert txns[0].authority == \"example.com\"\r\n    assert txns[0].status_code == 200\r\n    assert txns[0].flow_id == \"flow1\"\r\n    assert txns[0].txn_id == compute_txn_id_http1(\"flow1\", 0)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_http1_parse_keepalive_two():\r\n    h = HTTP1Handler()\r\n    c2s = (\r\n        b\"GET /first HTTP/1.1\\r\\nHost: example.com\\r\\nConnection: keep-alive\\r\\n\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"GET /second HTTP/1.1\\r\\nHost: example.com\\r\\nConnection: keep-alive\\r\\n\\r\\n\"\r\n    )\r\n    s2c = (\r\n        b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\nContent-Length: 5\\r\\nConnection: keep-alive\\r\\n\\r\\nhello\"\r\n        b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\nContent-Length: 5\\r\\n\\r\\nworld\"\r\n    )\r\n    txns = h.parse(c2s, s2c, \"flow1\", [(0, 1000.0)], [(0, 1000.02)])\r\n    assert len(txns) == 2\r\n    assert txns[0].path == \"/first\"\r\n    assert txns[1].path == \"/second\"\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "6a98b9871a3240c12092c9f179fc7d5c48c64ed97ba753a02aa5555ee0c6742d", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}]}
